positive: Symmetrical overhead composition of a mystical celestial portal opening through a bioluminescent forest. The scene features highly stylized, geometric flora integrated with abstract cosmic nebula elements. The style must be clean vector art with strong silhouettes, using a restricted palette of deep indigo, teal, metallic gold, and cream. Focus on extreme contrast and perfect symmetry, ideal for an apparel print. Highly intricate pattern work, minimalist maximalism, centered composition, hyperdetailed line art.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly drawn, blurry, dirty, noisy, grain, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, out of frame
